name: bao-browser-m0
description: Record + deterministic replay spike — single page, no LLM, no backend.

scripts.test: node build.mjs && node test/e2e.mjs && node test/list.mjs && node test/blindspots.mjs && node test/virtual.mjs && node test/frames.mjs && node test/forceopen.mjs && node test/editable.mjs && node test/spa.mjs && node test/nav.mjs && node test/check.mjs && node test/keyboard.mjs && node test/pointerdown.mjs && node test/assert.mjs && node test/download.mjs && node test/grounding.mjs && node test/golden.mjs && node test/snapshot.mjs
scripts.test:live: node build.mjs && node test/live-blindspots-open-shadow.mjs && node test/live-blindspots-canvas.mjs && node test/live-blindspots-frames.mjs && node test/live-blindspots-virtual.mjs && node test/live-blindspots-closed-shadow.mjs
scripts.test:live-gaps: node build.mjs && node test/live-gaps-forms.mjs && node test/live-gaps-spa.mjs && node test/live-gaps-editors.mjs && node test/live-gaps-feed.mjs
